channel.title: w3srss
channel.description: subscribe to my rss feed for latest updates.

item.title: ADB - Utilities Worth Your Time
item.description:
ADB is an underatted tool that has very feature rich capabilities. From perfoming full system backups,
uninstalling / installing android apps
booting an android into Recovery , Download or Fastboot mode
usefull during custom ROM flashing.

perfoming full device backup
